keywords: eligibility before audit write order constraint ineligible attempt corrupt audit trail FLOW-08 inversion IR-1
ironRules: eligibility GET is executionOrder=1 — before any write, before SETNX, before validation
Ineligible submissions never create audit records — audit trail records valid events only
If peer flow (FLOW-04, FLOW-09) not ACTIVE → ReviewRejected(peer_flow_unavailable), no audit
This pattern INVERTS the FLOW-08 audit-first-then-eligibility order — both are domain-correct
